rows.review: R6I must be embedded inside the existing prep-room shell, not replace it.
R6I uses similar restrained tokens, but R6K must reuse original CSS variables rather than introduce a second theme.
R6I card density is acceptable only if inserted as a compact upstream-confirmation layer above the current lesson body.
R6I must keep the original language: preview first, teacher confirmation before effect, no formal write.

original_page_evidence: right drawer and collapsed details patterns
rows.review: Official references should remain in the right assist area or collapsed drawer, not in the first decision lane.

required_followup: R6K should reuse original prep-room shell tokens and not create an unrelated full-page theme.
R6K should keep R6I content as an internal upstream-confirmation layer.
